raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Sir/Madam, please help with this problem I am having with Best Buy. On XXXX, I spoke with XXXX, and explained to him that on XXXX, I purchased an XXXX at Best Buy with my Best Buy Visa Card. I told him that shortly after on XXXX, I went in to return the XXXX because they had a better deal at XXXX. I also explained to XXXX that when returning the XXXX, the customer Service XXXX forgot to return the XXXX XXXX coverage, which was more than {$200.00}. XXXX refused to refund the total amount I paid and said they could only give me a partial refund. I further explained that the customer service rep should've refunded me the XXXX XXXX plan when I returned the XXXX and I asked him if he could escalate this issue. He escalated the issue, but this is the XXXX time I've spoken to the Best Buy Customer Service line in a time frame of 2 months and am having a hard time reaching a solution with them. XXXX the customer service supervisor, gave me a case number : XXXX. 
Sir/Madam, please help me find a solution with them and have them refund the full amount. I never used the XXXX XXXX plan and it really should've been refunded. I only had that XXXX for 1 day. I appreciate your attention to this matter. This has caused a bit of stress, time and gas and late fees on my credit card statements because I was not expecting such a high bill due to the return.
